commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a9dc0f988c4ed36a9175fe6387296ec3aa11e959)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu drive list cursor inputs and an `all` mode, paginates `info` lookup through `drive.file.list`, and adds mocked regression tests for the drive tool.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +213. Total +268 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main returns only the first `drive.file.list` page and `info` does not follow `has_more` / `next_page_token`; the linked issue also includes a mocked two-page repro, but I did not run a live Feishu tenant repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because live Feishu proof, fetch-all product risk, and the sibling PR lane choice cannot be settled by an automated repair alone.

target.title: fix(feishu): add pagination support for drive list and info
target.body:
## Summary

Feishu drive list/info missing pagination support

## Changes

- `extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts`: Add page_size, page_token, and all parameters
- `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`: Add pagination loop for listFolder and getFileInfo
- `extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts`: Add 2 regression tests for list.all pagination

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu drive list and info actions lacked pagination, failing when folders contain more than 10 items (the default page size).

Real environment tested: ubuntu-24.04, Node 24, branch fix/issue-93928-feishu-drive-pagination.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.8

 ✓ 19 tests passed (19)

 Regression tests added:
 ✓ list with all:true paginates through multiple pages
 ✓ list without all:true does not paginate when has_more is true
 ✓ forwards list pagination cursors and returns continuation metadata
 ✓ searches subsequent drive pages for info while preserving folder scope

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  19 passed (19)
```

Paginated list behavior:
- `all: true`: loops through all pages (has_more + page_token) until complete
- Without `all: true` (default): returns single page with has_more/next_page_token metadata
- `page_size` and `page_token` are passed through to the Feishu API as specified

Observed result after fix: All 19 drive tests pass, including 2 new regression tests that verify the pagination loop correctly continues when `all: true` and stops at one page otherwise. The pagination logic matches the existing has_more + page_token pattern used elsewhere in the codebase.

What was not tested: End-to-end with a real Feishu tenant with >10 items in a folder (requires platform-specific credentials).

Closes: #93928
target.author: ajwan8998
